SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2008 - CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, HOWEVER THE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAAVEDRA, LEOPOLDO SAAVEDRA, ANGELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AGUILAR, PEDRO BETANCOURTH, ILSE M $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,075.00, THE COURT REDUCED THE MONTHLY RENT AS AN ALLOWANCE FOR CONDITIONS IN THE SUBJECT RENTAL UNIT. PLAINTIFFS ARE ORDERED TO DISMISS ACTION NUMBER 627316. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
